feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Extended Warehouse Management
feed.subtitle: SAP Extended Warehouse Management Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Clear Open PMR from "Stage for Production" app
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We have few component quantity which are no longer required to be consumed against an order but in "Stage for Production" app these components are still showing as these needs to be staged because the PMR is exisitng. Can we get rid of these PMR"s which are no longer required to stage

example: For an order "O1", we need 100 EA of component "A". But we have completed the order by just staging and consuming 98 EA"s of "A". Now the order O1 is finally confirmed but in stage for produciton app, we still see 2 EA needs to be staged which is creating a confusion to the operators. 

Can we clear the record for 2 EA from "Stage for Production" app ?

I know that it will be cleared if we change the quantity of component "A" in "O1" to 98 but this is not so feasible as we need to change for each order and we do TECO at the end of the month. We use cross- order staging. 

 

Thanks

Vamsi Krishna

entry.title: What configurations/enhancements in SAP EWM we can implement to prioritize warehouse task creation?
entry.content:
Hello SAP EWM Community,

We’re looking to optimize the creation and prioritization of warehouse tasks for high-demand items in our distribution center managed by SAP EWM. Specifically, we aim to reduce the picking time and improve order fulfillment rates for these items.

Key Points:

  1. Our warehouse handles a mix of high- and low-demand items.
  2. Current picking strategies do not adequately prioritize high-demand items, leading to delays.
  3. We utilize standard picking and putaway strategies configured in SAP EWM.

Specific Question:

What configurations or enhancements in SAP EWM can be implemented to prioritize warehouse task creation for high-demand items, ensuring faster picking and improved order fulfillment?

Looking forward to your insights and recommendations!

Best regards

entry.title: GR qty more than inbound delivery quantity in PRDI EWM
entry.content:
Inbound delivery got status is red due to the error – GR qty more than inbound delivery quantity. Hence the delivery gets into red status.

Unpacked the products from HU. No HU available now.

Please help us to get the delivery to green at the earliest.

entry.title: No direct postings possible to G/L account XXXXX we are receiving this queue error in EWM
entry.content: Dears we received a user complaint for the issue " No direct postings possible to G/L account XXXXX " they were trying to post a GR in EWM. We asked for detailed process and they mentioned us: we made movement 202 in migo, then we accepted the delivery in scwm/prdi. Unfortunately the system did not record movement 202 in ERP, because a queue appeared. We made the order return for movement 201." We checked in FS00 it is mentioned that the G/L is set for automatic postings. In SMq2 it shows as a SYSFAIL whereas in SLG1 there is no error. Please help

entry.title: Deficit of BA Stck.in qual.insp 529 KG : Material Plant 1000 Batch
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We received user complaint: Deficit of BA Stck.in qual.insp 529 KG : Material Plant 1000 Batch. Upon further analysis we checked that there is no stock of the material and mentioned batch in MMBE. Also, we checked in EWM monitor and we can see that the Handling unit is present whereas when we tried to check In HUMO the HU does not exist. This error is stuck in EWM monitor and the main problem we do not have any delivery associated with this. We guided user in changing the stock type from Unrestricted to Quality in ewm, but they could not performed and they received the same error. Need help in getting a way to solve this queue error. Since, business users are also unaware how this queue error occurred.

 

Thanks

entry.title: Catch weight quantity wrongly getting determined in outbound
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I have one issue in which the material the Catch weight material but whenever I'm creating and outbound from STO the parallel unit of measure (CW) is getting calculated from material master 1CW = 480 KG but the actual CW quantity in MMBE is 420 KG (Actual HU Qty), previously it was correctly getting picked as per the quantity in MMBE. But now something happened it's calculating from master data and due to this the queues are getting stuck with error "valuation quantity becomes negative" due to less catch weight at S4.

Please suggest what need to be done in this case.

Thanks,

Vinod.

entry.title: SAP EWM and Loftware Integration – Documentation and Setup Guidance
entry.content:
Hi Community,

I’m currently working on integrating SAP EWM with Loftware for label printing, and I’m looking for any guidance or documentation related to this integration.

Your suggestions or references would be highly appreciated.

Thanks in advance!
Seshu

entry.title: How to send HU data after reception of inbound delivery from EWM to SAP ECC?
entry.content:
Currently the system is removing HU from inbound in ECC after posting GR in EWM. I want to maintain this information and send received HUs in message queue to ECC.

below message queue that is being sent from EWM to ECC after inbound reception. HU data are not included in this message: 

EWM HUs related to inbound: 

ECC Inbound after reception in EWM:

Please note that this is case of communication between Decentralized EWM and SAP ECC.

entry.title: Inspection Lot cancellation after Goods receipt and putaway
entry.content:
Hello,

for the vendor return process in EWM, we need to cancel the inspection lot before return to vendor is initiated from MIGO with reference to GR material document.

Is there any way to cancel the inspection lot through config or enhancement, so that user don't need to manually cancel it every time before vendor return. 

Regards,

Atul

entry.title: How to automate a warehouse task creation
entry.content:
Hi there,

I have a process which consists to transfer material across different storage types. I need to automate the creation of the next task after the previous one is confirmed. Example :

First task : storage type SRAC to NAVS

second one : storage type NAVS to NAVE

third one : NAVE to CRAC

I will create the first manually and I want that when I confirm it, the second one is automatically created and when the second is confirmed, the third one is created too.

How would you configure the system?

Thanks!

entry.title: Issue in EWM outbound distribution from ECC "No sales quantity is saved for item"
entry.content:
I have an outbound delivery stuck in EWM queue with the error below:

Item 000010: No sales quantity is saved for item

I have checked the customizing for outbound delivery and it all seems alright, and I tried to add the entry for quantity offsetting PPQ but it doesnt help.

Please let me know if you have recommandations to resolve this issue.

entry.title: Not able to delete WH BIN- FS10-0004 ( /SCWM/LC1023)
Posting rejected (UPDATE_REJECT).Order 104XXXX could not be saved and Message No.COIS008
Issue creating storage bins via LS01N – Missing LGTYP and LGBER values
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I’m currently facing an issue while trying to create new storage bins using transaction LS01N.

The problem is that the fields Storage Type (LGTYP) and Storage Section (LGBER) are missing or not maintained – they show up empty, and I can’t proceed.

I assume these values are supposed to be predefined in the system, but it looks like they’re not.

 

My questions are:

1. Where and how can I maintain or create Storage Types (LGTYP) and Storage Sections (LGBER)?

2. What are the relevant transactions or SPRO paths to configure this?

3. Are there any important dependencies or things to watch out for when setting them up?

Would really appreciate a step-by-step guide or any advice from someone who's done this before. 

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Is SAP Warehouse Robotics available for SAP S/4 HANA EWM on Public Cloud?
entry.content:
Is SAP Warehouse Robotics available for SAP S/4 HANA Public Cloud based EWM?

In case if it is not available, is there any other way for managing AMR (Autonomous Mobile Robots)  with EWM managed warehouse in S/4 Public Cloud?

entry.title: Storage bin BGM does not exist (check your entry)Message No. L9009I am facing above error
entry.content:
When i am trying to post Goods receipt through MIGO.I am getting the below error.

Can someone help me for this issue?

entry.title: Storage bin does not exist message no : L9009
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have created S-BIN,S-TYPE but i have facing this error.

I am facing below error when I  posting stock transfer by using 351 M.Type by using MIGO.

I have configured below things before posting Stock transfer.

1.Movement type:

2.Storage type:

3.Requirement type:

entry.title: How to create an entry in table /SCWM/AQUA
entry.content:
Hi,

I want to create an entry with ABAP code for table /SCWM/AQUA.

Since this is the development phase, the system configuration is not completed. If I use stardard method, I will received an error such as 'System XXX not assigned to any business system group'.

I tried to use '/SCWM/CL_API_HANDLING_UNIT', but there are too many validations which will always lead to error.

I can I make entries without availablity check?

entry.title: EWM Outbound delivery - how to update a custom status value?
entry.content:
Outbound delivery orders (/SCWM/PRDO transaction) have Status tab where different statuses are displayed. Based on the information online (Exhibit A), it appears that these statuses change value when something happens with the delivery. This is fine.

It is possible though to add a custom status profile and new custom status(es), which would be shown together with the standard ones in the same tab. This is what we have done and added a Z... status (see the screenshot below). (Tcode for custom statuses is BS02.)

Question: is it possible to set the value (e.g. active/inactive) of such custom status programmatically? We have an interface with 3rd party system where we'd like to change the status value to manage outbound delivery in a very specific scenario.

After searching Google and SAP Notes, I've found no information at all on how these custom statuses could be updated programmatically. The usual ODO update using /scdl/cl_sp_prd_out doesn't work for statuses. We can read the statuses but cannot update them: aspect /scdl/if_sp_c=>sc_asp_head_status has no update method. I'm guessing this is intentional for standard statuses, but this is a custom one, which we'd like to control. How can we do that?

entry.title: Inbound Delivery 180000013 could not be distributed Message No. VL589
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

While saving inbound delivery in S4 system I am getting the message: ‘Inbound Delivery XXXXXX could not be distributed Message No. VL589’.

I have checked in VL32N -->Edit-->check distribution document and it tells me: 'The delivery cannot be distributed (see the subsequent message) Message No. VL452'.

I wonder the interface between ECC and EWM is not well configured.

Has anyone had similar experience and got the accepted solution?

Thanks a lot!

Vincent
